evals.prompt: 我需要把 Petstore 的 Swagger 页面转成 Markdown 文档，URL 是 https://petstore.swagger.io
evals.expected_output: Agent uses web-scraper openapi command to discover and convert the OpenAPI spec from Swagger UI to structured Markdown with endpoints, parameters, and schemas

evals.prompt: 帮我分析一下 https://cn.vuejs.org 这个文档站的结构，看看有哪些页面
evals.expected_output: Agent uses web-scraper discover command. Smart Discovery extracts navigation links via HTTP (L0) without launching a browser

evals.prompt: I need to pull down all the API docs from https://docs.example.com and save them as a single markdown file
evals.expected_output: Agent uses web-scraper fetch with --auto --merge to discover pages and merge into a single markdown file

evals.prompt: 帮我把飞书开放平台的这个 API 文档读取出来 https://open.feishu.cn/document/server-docs/im-v1/message/create
evals.expected_output: Agent uses web-scraper fetch. L0 probe detects SPA, auto-fallback to L1 browser engine with networkidle wait for full content rendering

evals.prompt: I tried reading https://open.feishu.cn/document/server-docs/application-scope/scope-list with read_url_content but got almost nothing back. Can you help?
evals.expected_output: Agent recognizes read_url_content failure as SPA signal and uses web-scraper fetch. Engine auto-routes to L1 browser

evals.prompt: 把这个文档站的所有页面都抓下来 https://gorm.io/docs/
evals.expected_output: Agent uses discover then fetch --from-file or --auto. L0 HTTP engine handles this static site without browser

evals.prompt: 把这几个页面的内容都抓下来合并成一个文件：https://cn.vuejs.org/api/composition-api-setup.html 和 https://cn.vuejs.org/api/reactivity-core.html
evals.expected_output: Agent creates a URL list file, then uses web-scraper fetch --from-file with --merge to batch fetch and merge

evals.prompt: 这个企业微信的开发文档页面内容读不出来 https://developer.work.weixin.qq.com/document/path/90664
evals.expected_output: Agent uses web-scraper fetch. L0 detects SPA, auto-falls back to L1 browser. Default PruningContentFilter removes sidebar noise

evals.prompt: 把企业微信通讯录管理的 API 文档全部下载到本地，要干净的 Markdown，不要导航栏那些噪音
evals.expected_output: Agent uses discover --json to get URL list, filters relevant APIs, fetches with --selector for precision extraction, saves to organized folder structure

evals.prompt: 帮我在本地建一套飞书消息 API 的参考文档，按接口分文件
evals.expected_output: Agent follows 'Build organized local documentation' workflow: discover → filter URLs → write to file → fetch --from-file -o dir/ → organize files by API category

evals.prompt: 飞书 API 文档的响应体字段是折叠的，抓取时展开不了，帮我把完整内容抓下来
evals.expected_output: Agent uses --js flag with targeted JS to click expand buttons before extraction, or uses --expand-all preset. Falls back to custom JS if preset insufficient

evals.prompt: I need to execute some JavaScript on a SPA page to extract hidden data from window.__NEXT_DATA__
evals.expected_output: Agent uses web-scraper exec command with --js to execute JS on the page and return the result as JSON

evals.prompt: 这个页面有无限滚动加载，普通抓取只能拿到一部分内容
evals.expected_output: Agent uses --scroll-full flag to scroll through entire page triggering lazy loading before content extraction
